text: Hey, quick question about the app. Is there a glitch today? My friend said something about it.

Dear Customer Support, I recently purchased two items but only received one in the shipment. I would appreciate it if you could process a refund for the missing item rather than sending a replacement, as I am in need of a prompt resolution. Additionally, the tracking information included some unrelated products, which has caused confusion. Thank you for your assistance.
Could you please provide information regarding any scheduled maintenance or outages anticipated for this weekend? It is pertinent to our planning.
I received my order today but missing one item. Please process a refund for it.
ordered 2 items, only got 1. want refund for missing one.

Hi there! I was just wondering if there's any planned maintenance this weekend. It's really crucial for our project timeline, and I can't afford any surprises, especially with everything else going on right now.
I'm trying to log in, but it keeps saying my password is incorrect, even though I'm sure it's right. Can you help?
i keep trying to log in but i get this error code 403. can someone help?
cant login, it says my pass wrng but its correct. also, i got new email and no verif codes sent.
I can't connect to the Wi-Fi on my laptop, even though my phone is fine. I've restarted it twice, still no luck.
I'm really worried about any service interruptions this weekend, especially since we have a big launch planned. Are we going to be okay?

Hey, so I've been trying to access my account but it keeps saying the password is wrong, even though I'm sure I'm typing it correctly. I tried resetting it, but the email with the reset link never arrived, and now I can't log in at all. It's been super frustrating because I really need to access my documents. Can someone please help me with this?
I can't believe this. It's the fourth time my order got messed up. I want to escalate this issue now.
Hey, I ordered two shirts but only received one. I really just want my money back for the missing one, not another shirt.

I'm really frustrated with my recent order. I received the wrong item, it was completely different from what I asked for, and now I have to go through all these steps to get it sorted. It's just a hassle, and I expected better service from you. Also, the website keeps giving me errors when I try to report this issue, which really adds to my annoyance. Can you please address this?

Hello support team, I'm having a bit of an issue with my account. It seems that my profile information is incomplete, as I noticed that my email address is not fully updated. Unfortunately, I can't find the place to edit it myself, and I really need to resolve this as soon as possible.

I'm experiencing an issue where the application fails to launch after the most recent update. It simply displays a blank screen before closing unexpectedly, and I've tried restarting my device without success.
app keeps crashing when I try upload, error msg says 'fail to sync'. very frust. pls help.

Hello, I recently placed an order and I believe there's been a mix-up. I ordered two items, but I only received one. It's quite frustrating since I was relying on both items arriving. I would like to request a refund for the one that was missing instead of having it shipped again. Thank you!

I've been having a really tough time accessing my account lately. It seems like someone else might have the password because every time I try to log in, I get an error message saying my credentials are incorrect. It's been quite frustrating and I believe my account may be compromised. I could really use some assistance with this issue.

I can't believe this! I've reached out multiple times about my order and still haven't received a response. It feels like I'm just being ignored here. I need to speak with someone who can actually help me, as this is incredibly frustrating.
